scripts.compile: npm run version:sync && npm run compile --workspace=packages/shared --workspace=packages/mcu-debug --workspace=packages/mcu-debug-proxy
scripts.check:shared-package: npm run compile --workspace=packages/shared && npm run check:shared-package:exports && npm run update-commit-hash --workspace=packages/mcu-debug && npm run check-types --workspace=packages/mcu-debug && npm run check-types --workspace=packages/mcu-debug-proxy
